description: As an occupational health and safety technician, complete an environmental health assessment for Bonifacio Caput, a factory maintenance worker with recurrent respiratory symptoms suspected to be aggravated by poor housing conditions. Create a new Domiciliary Unit (DU) named 'DU-CAPUT-001' with address '47 Industrial Avenue' and link Bonifacio Caput's patient record to this unit. Document an active COPD diagnosis (ICD-10 J44.x) for him, order at least two relevant baseline laboratory tests, and schedule an environmental reassessment follow-up appointment between 30 and 60 days from today. Login credentials: username 'admin', password 'gnusolidario'.
